texto: What are you really living for? It's crucial to realize that you either glorify God, or you glorify something or someone else. You're always making something look big. If you don't glorify God when you're involved in a conflict, you inevitably show that someone or something else rules your heart.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ken Sande que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What are you really living for? It's crucial to realize that you either glorify God, or you glori…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, glory-of-god, idolatry, com foco em idolatry e selfishness.
